packages.name: wxwidgets
packages.description:
Widget toolkit and tools library for creating graphical user interfaces (GUIs) for cross-platform applications. 
Set WXWIDGETS_USE_STL in a custom triplet to build with the wxUSE_STL build option.
Set WXWIDGETS_USE_STD_CONTAINERS in a custom triplet to build with the wxUSE_STD_CONTAINERS build option.
packages.comment: This is the port (recipe) consumed by vcpkg.

packages.name: wxwidgets:x64-windows
packages.comment: This is a binary package built by vcpkg.
